core_model.structure_summary: A single second-order nonlinear ordinary differential equation with a first-derivative dissipative term, a sinusoidal restoring nonlinearity of the state, and a periodic external forcing term, studied near resonance.

variables.meaning: dissipation rate, natural frequency, and drive amplitude/frequency
periodic external forcing at tunable frequency

notes: Core is the damped driven equation with sin(x) nonlinearity; the linear (sin x -> x) harmonic-oscillator version is the comparison baseline. threshold_nonlinearity is used here in the sense of the bounded sinusoidal restoring term (no better tag for a sinusoidal potential); no strictly matching feature for sin(x) exists in the vocabulary.
